purpose: Defines runtime monitoring classes for finance-domain quality drift, feedback recurrence, compliance recurrence, source freshness pressure, and regression-risk buildup.

quality_degradation.description: Repeated or severe decline in answer quality score from Layer 15 feedback envelopes.

compliance_recurrence.description: Repeated unsafe-advice, missing-caveat, disclosure, guarantee, or financial-data handling issues.

source_freshness_pressure.description: Repeated user or regression signals indicating finance information may be stale, changed, or source-sensitive.

calculation_recurrence.description: Repeated math, ratio, valuation, projection, or scenario-calculation issues.

evidence_support_decay.description: Repeated unsupported-claim, missing-citation, weak-evidence, or source-conflict feedback.

user_correction_cluster.description: Repeated explicit user corrections within a short interaction window.

degraded.description: Repeated or material runtime quality degradation detected.

drift_detected.description: Behavioral drift has crossed monitoring threshold.

escalation_required.description: Critical recurrence or high-risk drift requires operator review.
